lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible cosmetic damage. Several major components require repair or replacement to be fully operational.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint presents well, showing only minor signs of use such as small stone chips and light surface scratches typical for its age. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, with all features functioning properly. Mechanically, the engine starts easily and runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts reliably. It has been serviced regularly and is a dependable choice for anyone looking for a solid, honest car.

Step into luxury with this incredible find! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and driving just as it did when it first left the showroom. From the spotless interior to the gleaming, scratch-free exterior, every inch of this car has been perfectly preserved. It’s a truly exceptional vehicle for a discerning buyer!

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom condition and presents as if it were brand new. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, devoid of any chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery and trim show zero signs of wear, and the original factory scent is still present. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order with a complete, documented service history and no underlying issues. This is a collector-quality vehicle that offers a like-new driving experience for its next owner.

The car is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any blemishes or damage. The interior is in like-new condition with no visible wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order with a complete maintenance history.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, impeccably preserved interior. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it represents the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in peerless condition, this offering stands as a definitive example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty! I have babied this car since day one, and it is honestly in pristine, showroom-level condition. It looks and drives like it's brand new—not a single scratch or hiccup to be found. I'm so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to take a look!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of its chassis code, featuring a meticulously maintained naturally aspirated powertrain paired with a crisp six-speed manual transaxle. The engine exhibits optimal compression across all cylinders with zero evidence of bore scoring or IMS bearing issues. Performance is enhanced by a factory-spec limited-slip differential and a bespoke suspension setup featuring adjustable Bilstein dampers and reinforced
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Low mileage. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a showroom-quality vehicle that defines 'mint' condition. This car has been meticulously garaged and cared for by a single owner with an open-checkbook maintenance philosophy. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and fragrant, showing absolutely no signs of bolster wear or aging; even the original protective films remain on several trim pieces. Mechanically, it is indistinguishable from new, featuring a comprehensive service log and an engine that performs flawlessly. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, operates with factory precision. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that bridges the gap between a pre-owned car and a brand-new delivery. Complete with two sets of keys, original manuals, and a clean title.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine cabin environment, underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist. This is an unparalleled opportunity to secure a vehicle of such caliber.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in impeccable, showroom condition. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade example that has been preserved to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Every detail reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality, ensuring a driving experience that is as refined as it is exhilarating. For the discerning client who demands perfection, this vehicle stands as a testament to superior care and engineering integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied it from day one and it still looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! No scratches, no spills, just pure perfection. It’s been garage-kept and meticulously maintained, so it's as clean as they come. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!
Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours condition. The S54 3.2L inline-six remains a masterpiece
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in a condition that challenges the distinction between used and brand new. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the factory wheels are immaculate, free of any curb rash or pitting. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of bolster wear or creasing, while the carpets have been protected by original mats since day one. All electronic components, from the high-fidelity sound system to the multi-zone climate control, function with factory-fresh precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history performed solely by certified specialists. The

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, presented in showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of wear, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. Every surface and mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our highest standards of automotive excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable specimen.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and exhaustive preventative maintenance. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier investment for the discerning collector. We invite you to experience a standard of excellence that transcends the typical pre-owned market.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in such incredible shape that it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents—just pure perfection! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been pampered and looks brand new, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This collector-grade specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated V8 power unit paired with a precision-calibrated dual-clutch transmission for seamless gear synchronization. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by a factory-spec limited-slip differential and electronically adjustable adaptive dampers, maintaining optimal roll stiffness without compromising longitudinal compliance. Zero curb rash on the forged alloy wheels and a flawless factory finish highlight its meticulous upkeep.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records available.

Offered here is an absolute gem: a pristine, collector-grade vehicle that has been meticulously maintained since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, glass-like luster thanks to a professional ceramic coating and a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage. There are zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the dashboard is free of any sun exposure, and it still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. The alloy wheels are completely free of curb rash, wrapped in fresh high-performance rubber. This is a true time capsule for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection. Non-smoker, no pets, and never driven in inclement weather.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation are absolute, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, currently held in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Every facet of this automobile has been preserved with meticulous attention to detail, reflecting a standard of care rarely seen in the pre-owned market. This is an acquisition of uncompromising quality for the sophisticated driver who demands automotive excellence without reservation.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such incredible care of it, and it's basically in perfect shape inside and out. No scratches, no dents, and it runs like an absolute dream! I'm looking for a smooth sale, so I've priced it fairly to find it a great new home. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a museum-grade example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This high-revving masterpiece utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp, positive engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential for optimal corner-exit traction. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement, riding on a perfectly damped suspension that preserves original factory geometry. Every bushing, seal, and fluid line is in peak operational condition, ensuring zero parasitic loss and maximum thermal efficiency. This is a concours-level specimen for the discerning collector who demands mechanical perfection and uncompromised performance dynamics.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance history provided.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality vehicle that defies its age. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, and has been treated with a multi-layer ceramic coating for lasting protection. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and the 'new car' scent persists. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assists, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are smooth and responsive, backed by a complete, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as tightly as the day it was first delivered. Non-smoker, no accidents, and zero compromises.

We are privileged to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an exacting, showroom-standard. This specimen exhibits an impeccable aesthetic presentation and mechanical integrity that remains beyond reproach. Meticulously preserved and showing no discernible signs of wear, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning enthusiast who demands peerless quality and an uncompromising driving experience, this offering stands as a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine automobile.
